title: Haste Pickaxe Potion
body:
# Haste Pickaxe Potion
## Description 
In Skip The Tutorials' July Series Of Getting All The Advancements In Minecraft, He Said He Wished He Had A Haste II Potion, and For A Joke It Would Be An Iron Pickaxe. So... Your Wish Is My Command!
## Features
- Adds The Haste Pickaxe And Its Corresponding Crafting Recipe

### Watch The Video [Here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fyNYmQ58oDw&t=1182s)!

## This Mod Will Not Be Updated
This Was Just For A Fun Little Thing, Sorry Its Not In The Version Of Minecraft Skip The Tutorial Is Using In The July Series But MCreator Doesn't Support That Yet. I Usually Code My Mods From Scratch With Just A Little Bit Of MCreator Involved, But Today For Something Simple Its Just 100% MCreator.

### Enjoy!
